content:textarea:2:58.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:2:58.html: The Women’s Auxiliary functions as a fundraising and volunteer service group that seeks to support The Salvation Army in its mission of spiritual redemption and social rehabilitation of those it serves.

content:textarea:8:64.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:8:64.html: The Salvation Army Women’s Auxiliary of Greenville is the only auxiliary in the state of South Carolina.  It is a committed volunteer group dedicated to doing the most good in our community. Meetings are held on the 2nd Wednesday of each month (except July) at 11:30 a.m. at the Kroc Center located at 42 Westfield Street in Greenville (lunch is served).

content:wysiwyg_basic:1781015674958:0.17.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:1781015674958:0.17.html:
Membership Levels

Annual Membership ($85.00 per fiscal year)

Lifetime Membership ($1,000)

*Annual membership is from Oct 1st – Sept 30th (fiscal year). If the joining date is after July 1, 2026, membership payment will cover the following fiscal year (Oct 1, 2026 - Sept 30, 2027

Complete the form to renew your current membership or apply for a new membership.

content:wysiwyg_basic:1781015946561:0.04.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:1781015946561:0.04.html:
Membership Payment

You can pay your Member Dues through the following options:

1) Cash or check in person

You can also mail membership checks addressed to SAWA, 501 Rutherford St., Greenville, SC 29609. Download and complete the Membership form.

2) Pay online

*(Please be sure to type in the correct payment amount, and then select the membership type in the drop-down box)

3) Send through Venmo to @SAWAGVL

You can also gift a membership to another person. Download and complete the form, and email it to Amanda Link, or mail it to SAWA Greenville, 501 Rutherford St., Greenville, SC 29609.

content:textarea:33:65.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:33:65.html: When you make a financial contribution to The Women's Auxiliary of Greenville, your donation will be used to help your neighbors receive the help that they need. By mail at: The Salvation Army Women's Auxiliary | PO Box 1237 Greenville, SC, 29602. Click the red button below to donate online.

content:wysiwyg_basic:1781016347815:0.67.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:1781016347815:0.67.html:
SAWA is the volunteer, educational, and fundraising arm of The Salvation Army of Greenville, SC, supporting initiatives that enrich the lives of those individuals living in our community by meeting them at their point of need.

As a member of SAWA, you are among Greenville's most influential and active community leaders, women with a generous spirit and determination to be “doing the most good." Meetings are held on the 2nd Wednesday of each month (except July) at 11:30 a.m. at the Kroc Center located at 42 Westfield Street in Greenville (lunch is served).  Members have many opportunities throughout the year to volunteer and attend social events and meetings.
